title: Routine: leak repair scheduling
turns: Hi, I've got a slow leak under my kitchen sink. It's been dripping for a couple days.
Yeah, it's not emergency — probably just a bad seal. Can someone come look at it?
Thursday afternoon would work. My name is Sarah Reynolds.
Sure, it's 148 Elm Street.
That's right, 5552340199.
Yes, please confirm.

title: Emergency: burst pipe in basement
turns: Oh my god, I've got water pouring into my basement! A pipe just burst!
I don't know, it's spraying everywhere. I shut off the main valve but there's already like two inches of water.
I'm Mike Chen, 3125558765. Send someone right now please!
2214 Oakwood Drive. How soon can they get here?

title: Reschedule existing appointment
turns: Hi, I had an appointment on Thursday for my water heater but I need to move it. Something came up at work.
Could I move it to Friday instead? Later in the day?
Friday at 3pm is perfect. My name is Linda Park and it's at 88 Parkview Lane.
Yeah that works, thanks.

title: Rude / impatient caller
turns: Look, I've been on hold for ten minutes. Are you guys actually coming out today or not?
My toilet's been running all day and I'm about to lose my mind. It's a constant hissing sound.
Fine. I'm at 401 Maple. The name is Dave. Just get someone over here.
Tomorrow morning, whatever, as long as it's early.

title: Confused / meandering caller
turns: Uh hi, I don't really know who to call. My dad said you guys do plumbing?
So there's this thing in the bathroom, the... the disposal? No wait, not disposal, the thing under the sink that drains...
Oh right, the garbage disposal. Yeah that. It's making a terrible grinding noise.
I don't actually know — my mom's house. Let me check. It's 9 Harrison Court. And I'm Amy, uh, Amy Nolan.
Whenever you can come is fine, preferably Friday.

title: Caller gives all info up front
turns: Hi, this is James Wu at 411 Beacon Road, 7025557834. I need to book a drain cleaning for Thursday 10am.
Yes that's right.
Please confirm the appointment.
